name: Marygold Companies, Inc.
summary: Marygold Companies, Inc. (MGLD) is a diversified holding company operating through subsidiaries in financial services and fintech. Its key businesses include USCF Investments, Inc., a U.S. investment fund management company managing assets under management (AUM), and a Fintech application (app) under development and marketing. The company also pursues strategic acquisitions to expand existing businesses and enter new markets.
